programme.title: Movie Contd - Thulli Thirintha Kaalam
programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.title: Sengaathu
programme.desc: Two closely related families fall apart over a member of one family giving witness against a person belonging to the other in a murder trial. Their relationship deteriorates further from there.

programme.title: Senthooram
programme.desc: Muthu, a village chief, adopts Rosa, an orphan, and takes care of her. When Rosa gets married to Kattalai, Muthu tries to cause problems for the couple.

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: Aravind, a college student, falls in love with the newcomer Anjali, unaware that she is the daughter of the commissioner of police and his acquaintance, Jayachandran.

programme.title: Kaadhal Sadugudu
programme.desc: Chitambaram doesn't want his daughter Kausalya to marry Suresh. Suresh then decides not to marry Kausalya without her father's permission. Finally Chitambaram relents and the lovers reunite.

programme.title: Aazhvaar
programme.desc: Aalwar, a young man, loves his mother and sister dearly but fails to protect them from his foes. However, he turns into a ruthless killer, dressing up as Hindu gods, to avenge their murder.

programme.title: Pulival
programme.desc: Kasi, an employee of a supermarket, steals an expensive phone containing explicit videos belonging to a rich businessman Karthik. Hell breaks loose when the videos get uploaded onto the Internet.

programme.title: Sundara Pandiyan
programme.desc: Sundarapandian goes to any length to help his friends. Once, he ends up conveying his friend's feelings to a girl who turns out to be his ex-lover. Rekindled feelings turn their lives upside down.

programme.title: Neerparavai
programme.desc: Despite knowing that her fisherman husband Arulappasamy is dead, Esther continues to go near the beach and pray for his return. Her son and daughter-in-law are perplexed by her strange behaviour.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Neerparavai
programme.desc: Despite knowing that her fisherman husband Arulappasamy is dead, Esther continues to go near the beach and pray for his return. Her son and daughter-in-law are perplexed by her strange behaviour.

programme.title: Sevarkodi
programme.desc: Kali agrees to get his sister Valli married to the rich but old Annachi for his money. However, Valli elopes with Bala, her lover. Infuriated, Kali swears revenge.

programme.title: Sindanai Sei
programme.desc: Aadhi meets his childhood friends in the city who too struggle to make both ends meet. Together, they successfully execute a bank robbery. But they get killed one after the other after the robbery.

programme.title: Pongalo Pongal
programme.desc: Subbu and his four friends are jobless and loathed by their fathers. After losing money in a scam, they start a business with their college mate Chitra's help. But her rich father has different plans.

programme.title: Aanai
programme.desc: A police officer is suspended despite his honesty. Now, he serves as bodyguard to the daughter of a singer. When the girl is kidnapped, the bodyguard is suspected, lest he proves his innocence.

programme.title: MR.Bharath
programme.desc: Businessman Gopinath abandons Shanti, his first love, to marry a rich heiress. Later, Bharath, Gopinath and Shanti's illegitimate son, seeks revenge from him for the injustice meted out to his mother.

programme.title: Ambasamuthiram Ambani
programme.desc: A poor guy meets a girl who falls for him but he is more focused on achieving his dreams. He buys a plot that is under construction, for his supermarket. However, before he can take it over, the owner dies and things take a turn.

programme.title: Surya Vamsam
programme.desc: Sakthivel, an influential man, is upset with his son Chinnarasu's careless attitude. He is further infuriated when Chinnarasu suddenly refuses to marry his cousin, Gowri.

programme.title: Billa II
programme.desc: David Billa works for Abbasi, a famous mobster in Goa. Due to a difference of opinion, Abbasi turns against David, and eventually gets killed by him. David must handle the situation carefully.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Billa 2
programme.desc: David Billa works for Abbasi, a famous mobster in Goa. Due to a difference of opinion, Abbasi turns against David, and eventually gets killed by him. David must handle the situation carefully.

programme.title: Sindhubath
programme.desc: Sindhu Bath is a 1995 Tamil drama film directed by Balu Anand, Starring Mansoor Ali Khan, Kasthuri and Sanghavi in lead roles.

programme.title: Sirithal Rasippaen
programme.desc: A rich young woman is madly in love with a manager. But things turn difficult for them after their families disapprove of their relationship.

programme.title: Pizza
programme.desc: Michael, a pizza delivery boy, lives with Anu, an aspiring horror fiction writer. One day, on a home delivery, he goes to a bungalow, where mysterious events begin to take place.

programme.title: Devi
programme.desc: Krishna, who wants a modern girl as his wife, is forced to marry Devi, a village belle. But strange things happen when he discovers that his wife wants to become an actress.

programme.title: Badhri
programme.desc: When a kickboxer gets attacked by his enemies and ends up bedridden, his brother sets out to fulfil his dream of winning the kickboxing championship.

programme.title: Mirudhan
programme.desc: When an intoxicated dog bites a security guard, unleashing a zombie outbreak in a hill station, Karthik, a policeman, takes up the responsibility of helping a team of doctors to find the antidote.

programme.title: Thoranai
programme.desc: Murugan comes to Chennai in search of his long-lost brother who had run away from home twenty years ago. He finds him caught in a gang war between two clans and tries to convince him to return home.

programme.title: Kundakka Mandakka
programme.desc: Ilango aspires to get his sister married to a millionaire. For this, he tries his best to find a rich suitor, but ultimately realises that money is not everything and lets her marry the one she loves.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Sri hari Kalyanam

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: When identical twins reunite after parting ways during their childhood, they find themselves trapped in a labyrinth of secrets, deception and crime.

programme.title: Varsham
programme.desc: Venkat and Shailaja meet on a train and fall in love. But Shailaja's father disapproves of their relationship and decides to marry her off to Bhadranna, a ruthless landlord, who is obsessed with her.

programme.title: Kanchana
programme.desc: When three spirits possess a timid young man and start making him act like a woman, his mother consults an exorcist who unearths a heartbreaking tale of societal injustice, murder and vengeance.

programme.title: Kousalya Krishnamurthy
programme.desc: Kousalya Krishnamurthy, a farmer's daughter, is determined to become an international cricketer. However, she is faced with challenges as she pursues her dream.

programme.title: Sankranthi
programme.desc: A jealous woman, Kalyani, tries to break the bond between her husband, Vishnu, and his brother, Raghavendra, because she gets unhappy with the respect her brother-in-law commands.

programme.title: Moksha
programme.desc: Sreenu's classmate invites him and his neighbour, Moksha, to a Valentine's Day party and gets him drunk. Later, his friend tries to rape her but somehow dies a horrendous death.

programme.title: Chattambipaaru
programme.desc: Born into a humble, rustic background burdened by familial & financial struggles, Parvathi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch as she bravely faces the odds of life with an unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Peythozhiyaathe
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Charulatha, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Mangalyam Thanthunanena
programme.desc: Bold and compassionate Nidhi finds happiness in making others happy. Circumstances lead to her tying the knot with a good friend & love of her life, Gowtham. With conspiracies within the family vying to break them apart, will true love prevail?

programme.title: Swayamvarapanthal
programme.desc: Nandini, a stunning village girl, works tirelessly out of deep devotion to her family. Meanwhile, fuelled by lingering resentment, Surya despises his mother & wilfully bonds with Nandini causing strife. Watch what destiny unfolds for Nandini & Surya

programme.title: Hridayam
programme.desc: In an unhappy marriage with a vicious wife, Dr.Niranjan's sole joy is his daughter Shruthi. While Sudhi & Devika believe they've found their soulmate in each other. But fate places them in a complex web of relationships when the couples cross paths.

programme.title: Chattambipaaru

programme.title: Kanyadanam
programme.desc: After his wife's demise Anandan is a doting father to his five daughters. As a man of strong values, he's an anchor & guiding light of love even after their marriage. Follow a loving father & his blessed daughters through the ups & downs of life.0

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Anu Pallavi
programme.desc: Conflicts arise & emotional bonds form when Pallavi, an IAS officer & single mom of a mischievous daughter encounters Vikranth, a single dad & suspended IAS officer. Together, they navigate parenthood, familial struggles & a second chance at love.

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Bhootayyana Maga Ayyu
programme.desc: Following the death of his ruthless landlord father, Ayyu earns the wrath of his villagers. But his biggest enemy is Gulla, who tries to stand against him in order to protect the locals.

programme.title: Nidhi
programme.desc: Movie starring Arjun, Devaraj, Tennis Krishna and is directed by Radhakrishna Bokka.

programme.title: Avane Nanna Ganda
programme.desc: Baloo, a cartoonist, falls in love with Mangala, who aspires to become a doctor. He attempts to express his feelings and win her heart in midst of her pursuance of her dream.

programme.title: Munjane
programme.desc: Manu and Pavithra, without having met, become fond of each other by exchanging notes on a bus travelling to each other's city. Later, Pavithra gets married off to a rich man, unaware that he is Manu.

programme.title: Gowdru
programme.desc: Ramegowda dotes on his sister, Gowri, and will go to any extent to keep her happy. When her jealous husband tries to separate them, things get out of control.

programme.title: Drama
programme.desc: Venkata, a young student, falls in love with his classmate, Nandini. One day, she kisses Venkata and in return asks him to take revenge on the principal for slapping her in front of everyone.

programme.title: Vijaya Dashami
programme.desc: A wealthy kind hearted landlord who is very happy about the return of his son from the oversees. His happiness comes to an end when the hidden truth about his 6 year old daughter who is come down to meet her grand parents is revealed to them

programme.title: Hendithghelthini
programme.desc: Jayaram adopts a child and is excited to surprise his wife by revealing the truth later. However, problems arise when he goes home to find another child, claiming to be his friend's daughter.

programme.title: Rajanna
programme.desc: Rajanna, an orphan who is raised by his uncle, falls in love with Suma, his uncle's daughter. However, things turn awry when Suma meets with an accident.

programme.title: Kass Iddone Boss
programme.desc: A man strongly believes that money is everything in life and will do anything to earn it. Soon he lands in trouble due to negative thinking.

programme.title: Arjuna
programme.desc: Arjuna, a young cop, sets out to avenge the death of his wife who gets killed by influential people. Later, he discovers that his seniors were involved in the crime, which leaves him further enraged.

programme.title: Rishi
programme.desc: Rishi, who hails from a rich family, shows interest in one of the spoilt brats in the college, where he is a trustee. He continues to protect him in spite of opposition.

programme.title: Eetu Ediretu
programme.desc: A brave young man decides to put an end to the evil tricks of a wicked warlock, who has been exploiting innocent people.

programme.title: Sipayi
programme.desc: Sipayi, who fights for the welfare of the people in his village, falls in love with Shanti. When she is forced to marry a criminal, he tries to change her fate.

programme.title: Soundarya
programme.desc: Soundarya film is the upper middle class family story who is an industrialist, his wife and daughter are dragged in the mafia land dealings.But he want to lead a peaceful life.mafia threaten the life.Finally, he involves in a criminal action innocently.

programme.title: Bhagyada Belaku
programme.desc: A rift between two close friends, Chandru and Prakash, emerges when Prakash's evil uncle fixes his marriage with Janaki, Chandru's secret lover. However, things go wrong when Prakash is murdered.

programme.title: Super Jodi
programme.desc: Cast - Ananth Nag, Jahangeer, Chidanand & Anjali

programme.title: Tuvi Tuvi Tuvi
programme.desc: Cast - RaTuvvi Tuvvi Tuvvi is a 1999 Indian Kannada-language comedy film directed by Singeetam Srinivasa Rao and written by Richard Louis. The film stars Raghavendra Rajkumar and Charulatha.

programme.title: Movie -Prema Entha Madhura
programme.desc: Vikram falls in love with different women at various stages of his life and with each experience, he bears the pain and emotions of separation.

programme.title: Movie -Durga Ashtami
programme.desc: A young girl, who is a devotee of Goddess Durga, goes through a series of trials and tribulations. However, her hardships are elevated by the Goddess in the end.

programme.title: Maryade Ramanna
programme.desc: Ramu returns to his hometown to sell a piece of land he owns and falls in love with a young woman only to find out that her parents want him dead.

programme.title: Ninnindale
programme.desc: Vicky, a thrill seeker from New York, meets Pramila who arrives in the city to look for employment. Pramila falls in love with Vicky but is disheartened to know that he does not feel the same way.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: A former counter-terrorism agent undertakes a special mission. However, he is betrayed by his friends who work for a secret agency and is accused of extremely treasonous acts.

programme.desc: This program features various hymns showcasing several temples and their deities.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama. Rajasekhar, a rich, influential man and his son Arun, live in a palatial home together with their extended family. Nandini, an Ichchadhaari Nagam”, (shapeshifting snake) awaits to avenge Rajasekhar’s past misdeed and regain the three ‘Kalachakram’ .

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.
